---
title: "Historical Finance Data"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    nav-buttons: [github]
    theme: darkly
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(DBI)
library(duckdb)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

BASE <- "https://huggingface.co/datasets/dsfefvx/finance-historical-data/resolve/main"

con <- dbConnect(duckdb())
invisible(dbExecute(con, "INSTALL httpfs; LOAD httpfs;"))

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 11) + theme(
  plot.background = element_rect(fill = "grey10", colour = NA),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey10", colour = NA),
  text = element_text(colour = "grey80"),
  axis.text = element_text(colour = "grey70"),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "grey25")
))
```

# Equity

## Row {height=70%}

### Column {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: Price History
eq <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT ticker, date, close FROM read_parquet('%s/equity_daily.parquet')
   WHERE ticker IN ('AAPL','MSFT','NVDA','GOOGL','AMZN','META')
   AND date >= '2020-01-01' ORDER BY ticker, date", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

ggplot(eq, aes(date, close, colour = ticker)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::dollar) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Close (log scale)", colour = NULL,
       title = "FAANG + NVDA daily close") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| title: Daily Returns
ret <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT ticker, date, close,
          (close - LAG(close) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY date))
          / LAG(close) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY date) AS ret
   FROM read_parquet('%s/equity_daily.parquet')
   WHERE ticker IN ('AAPL','NVDA','TSLA') AND date >= '2024-01-01'
   ORDER BY ticker, date", BASE)) |> as_tibble() |> filter(!is.na(ret))

ggplot(ret, aes(date, ret, colour = ticker)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.6, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey50", linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Daily return", colour = NULL,
       title = "Daily returns: AAPL, NVDA, TSLA (2024+)") +
  facet_wrap(~ticker, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
#| title: Top 10
cov <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT ticker, COUNT(*) as n, MIN(date) as first_date, MAX(date) as last_date
   FROM read_parquet('%s/equity_daily.parquet')
   GROUP BY ticker ORDER BY n DESC", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

top10 <- cov |> slice_max(n, n = 10)
ggplot(top10, aes(reorder(ticker, n), n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#3498db") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Trading days", title = "Longest histories") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma)
```

## Row {height=30%}

```{r}
#| title: Summary
eq_meta <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT COUNT(*) as rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ticker) as tickers,
          MIN(date) as first_date, MAX(date) as last_date
   FROM read_parquet('%s/equity_daily.parquet')", BASE))

tibble(
  Metric = c("Total rows", "Tickers", "First date", "Last date", "Source"),
  Value = c(format(eq_meta$rows, big.mark = ","), eq_meta$tickers,
    as.character(eq_meta$first_date), as.character(eq_meta$last_date), "Yahoo Finance")
) |> knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
#| title: All Tickers
knitr::kable(cov, col.names = c("Ticker", "Rows", "From", "To"))
```


# Crypto

## Row {height=70%}

### Column {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: Price History
cr <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT ticker, date, close FROM read_parquet('%s/crypto_daily.parquet')
   WHERE ticker IN ('BTC','ETH','SOL','BNB')
   AND date >= '2020-01-01' ORDER BY ticker, date", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

ggplot(cr, aes(date, close, colour = ticker)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::dollar) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Close (log scale)", colour = NULL,
       title = "Major crypto daily close") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| title: Stablecoins
stable <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT ticker, date, close FROM read_parquet('%s/crypto_daily.parquet')
   WHERE ticker IN ('USDC','USDT') AND date >= '2022-01-01'
   ORDER BY ticker, date", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

ggplot(stable, aes(date, close, colour = ticker)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.98, 1.02)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "USD price", colour = NULL,
       title = "Stablecoin peg: USDC vs USDT") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| title: All Tokens
cr_cov <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT ticker, COUNT(*) as n, MIN(date) as first_date, MAX(date) as last_date
   FROM read_parquet('%s/crypto_daily.parquet')
   GROUP BY ticker ORDER BY n DESC", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

knitr::kable(cr_cov, col.names = c("Token", "Rows", "From", "To"))
```

## Row {height=30%}

```{r}
#| title: Summary
cr_meta <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT COUNT(*) as rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ticker) as tokens,
          MIN(date) as first_date, MAX(date) as last_date
   FROM read_parquet('%s/crypto_daily.parquet')", BASE))

tibble(
  Metric = c("Total rows", "Tokens", "First date", "Last date", "Source"),
  Value = c(format(cr_meta$rows, big.mark = ","), cr_meta$tokens,
    as.character(cr_meta$first_date), as.character(cr_meta$last_date), "Yahoo Finance")
) |> knitr::kable()
```


# Macro

## Row {height=70%}

### Column {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: Interest Rates
rates <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT series_id, date, value FROM read_parquet('%s/macro_daily.parquet')
   WHERE series_id IN ('DGS2','DGS10','DGS30','DFF') AND date >= '2020-01-01'
   AND value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY series_id, date", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

ggplot(rates, aes(date, value, colour = series_id)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Yield (%)", colour = NULL,
       title = "US Treasury yields + Fed Funds rate") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| title: Credit Spreads
spreads <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT series_id, date, value FROM read_parquet('%s/macro_daily.parquet')
   WHERE series_id IN ('BAMLH0A0HYM2','BAMLC0A4CBBB') AND date >= '2020-01-01'
   AND value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY series_id, date", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

ggplot(spreads, aes(date, value, colour = series_id)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Spread (bps)", colour = NULL,
       title = "ICE BofA credit spreads: HY vs BBB") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| title: Yield Curve
yc <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT date, value FROM read_parquet('%s/macro_daily.parquet')
   WHERE series_id = 'T10Y2Y' AND date >= '2020-01-01'
   AND value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY date", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

ggplot(yc, aes(date, value)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4, colour = "#e74c3c") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Spread (%)", title = "10Y-2Y yield curve spread") +
  annotate("rect", xmin = min(yc$date[yc$value < 0]),
           xmax = max(yc$date[yc$value < 0]),
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = 0, fill = "#e74c3c", alpha = 0.15)
```

```{r}
#| title: VIX & Oil
vix_oil <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT series_id, date, value FROM read_parquet('%s/macro_daily.parquet')
   WHERE series_id IN ('VIXCLS','DCOILWTICO') AND date >= '2020-01-01'
   AND value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY series_id, date", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

ggplot(vix_oil, aes(date, value)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4, colour = "#3498db") +
  facet_wrap(~series_id, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "VIX and WTI Crude Oil")
```

## Row {height=30%}

```{r}
#| title: All Series
ma_cov <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT series_id, COUNT(*) as n, MIN(date) as first_date, MAX(date) as last_date
   FROM read_parquet('%s/macro_daily.parquet')
   GROUP BY series_id ORDER BY series_id", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

knitr::kable(ma_cov, col.names = c("Series", "Rows", "From", "To"))
```


# Factors

## Row {height=70%}

### Column {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: FF3 Daily
ff3 <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT factor_name, date, value FROM read_parquet('%s/factors.parquet')
   WHERE dataset = 'FF3' AND frequency = 'daily' AND date >= '2020-01-01'
   ORDER BY factor_name, date", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

ggplot(ff3, aes(date, value, colour = factor_name)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~factor_name, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Return (%)", title = "Fama-French 3 factors (daily, 2020+)") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
#| title: FF5 Cumulative
ff5 <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT factor_name, date, value FROM read_parquet('%s/factors.parquet')
   WHERE dataset = 'FF5' AND frequency = 'daily' AND date >= '2000-01-01'
   ORDER BY factor_name, date", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

ff5_cum <- ff5 |>
  group_by(factor_name) |>
  mutate(cum_ret = cumprod(1 + value / 100) - 1) |>
  ungroup()

ggplot(ff5_cum, aes(date, cum_ret, colour = factor_name)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Cumulative return", colour = NULL,
       title = "FF5 cumulative factor returns (2000+)") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| title: Momentum
mom <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT date, value FROM read_parquet('%s/factors.parquet')
   WHERE dataset = 'Mom' AND frequency = 'daily' AND date >= '2000-01-01'
   ORDER BY date", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

mom_cum <- mom |> mutate(cum_ret = cumprod(1 + value / 100) - 1)

ggplot(mom_cum, aes(date, cum_ret)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4, colour = "#2ecc71") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Cumulative return",
       title = "Momentum factor cumulative return (2000+)")
```

## Row {height=30%}

```{r}
#| title: Factor Summary
fa_cov <- dbGetQuery(con, sprintf(
  "SELECT dataset, frequency, factor_name, COUNT(*) as n,
          MIN(date) as first_date, MAX(date) as last_date
   FROM read_parquet('%s/factors.parquet')
   GROUP BY dataset, frequency, factor_name
   ORDER BY dataset, frequency, factor_name", BASE)) |> as_tibble()

knitr::kable(fa_cov, col.names = c("Dataset", "Freq", "Factor", "Rows", "From", "To"))
```

```{r}
#| label: cleanup
#| include: false
dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE)
```
